title: Polish: error boundaries, loading states, empty states, and rate limiting
description: Final polish pass before launch. Add React error boundaries, loading skeletons on all data-fetching pages, meaningful empty states with onboarding CTAs, and rate limiting on AI endpoints.

acceptance_criteria.text: Error boundaries catch and display user-friendly errors on all major pages
Loading skeletons shown during data fetches on dashboard, matter detail, and document pages
Empty states with actionable CTAs on matter list, documents tab, and tasks tab
AI endpoints (extraction, chat) rate limited at 10 req/min per user
All AI-generated content labelled with an 'AI-generated' badge

steps: Add loading.tsx skeletons for dashboard and matter pages
Build reusable EmptyState component with icon, title, description, CTA
Implement rate limiting on /api/chat and /api/documents/upload routes
Audit all AI output components and add 'AI-generated' label badge
